note: SACT v4.0 rollout period (April–June 2026). Only partial trust submissions — nationally incomplete. USABLE for preliminary analysis and Level 1-2 recalibration. Results reflect submitting trusts only, not full England picture. Do NOT trigger Level 3 full retrain until August 2026.
instructions: SACT v4.0 phase: rollout_partial. To use real data: download from NDRS portal and place CSV(s) in datasets/nhs_open_data/sact_v4/. The auto-learning scheduler will detect and ingest them within 24h.
